prompt_protocol.rule: Fill text_prompt with a short noun phrase for the class/appearance, and instance_hint with how to identify the selected GT object among similar instances.
prompt_protocol.scope: manual SA-V text labels for selected official object IDs

samples.instance_hint: standing basketball player near the right side of the court
samples.review_note: Green GT mask covers the standing basketball player near the right side of the court.

samples.instance_hint: standing person centered in the hallway
samples.review_note: Green GT mask covers the standing person in the hallway.

samples.instance_hint: child's right arm and hand on the right side of the image
samples.review_note: Green GT mask covers the child's right arm and hand, not the whole child.
